# 🔷 V2 — Logos / Pure Computation (Pythia)
**vertex** · shared · knowledge

Computation only (stratum 1). Pythia's seat at the Logos Circle (/circle). Delphic oracle / pure-computation revelation. Source: Cloaking Guide / Boundary Blade.
